response: A green sugar cube has melted. Which of these three openings—the star-shaped, the square, or the round one—should you place it into?

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a melted green sugar cube. Put it into one of these holes: the star-shaped one, the square one, or the round one. Which one?
